title: Drizzle .all()/.run() → portable — session remainder
consumer_purpose: Eliminate SQLite-only Drizzle methods .all() and .run() from session files for PG compatibility
content:
## Changes

### 1. packages/opencode/src/session/message-v2.ts (DIRTY — additive)
**hydrate function (~line 608)**: Remove `.all()` from `db.select().from(PartTable).where(...).orderBy(...).all()`
- Before: `db.select().from(PartTable).where(inArray(PartTable.message_id, ids)).orderBy(PartTable.message_id, PartTable.id).all()`
- After: `db.select().from(PartTable).where(inArray(PartTable.message_id, ids)).orderBy(PartTable.message_id, PartTable.id)`

**page function (~line 939)**: Remove `.all()` from `db.select().from(MessageTable).where(...).orderBy(...).limit(...).all()`
- Before: `...orderBy(desc(MessageTable.time_created), desc(MessageTable.id)).limit(input.limit + 1).all()`
- After: `...orderBy(desc(MessageTable.time_created), desc(MessageTable.id)).limit(input.limit + 1)`

### 2. packages/opencode/src/session/todo.ts (clean)
**Line 44**: Replace `.run()` with `.execute()` on delete
- Before: `db.delete(TodoTable).where(eq(TodoTable.session_id, input.sessionID)).run()`
- After: `db.delete(TodoTable).where(eq(TodoTable.session_id, input.sessionID)).execute()`

**Line 56**: Replace `.run()` with `.execute()` on insert
- Before: `.run()`
- After: `.execute()`

**Line 65**: Remove `.all()` from select
- Before: `db.select().from(TodoTable).where(eq(TodoTable.session_id, sessionID)).orderBy(asc(TodoTable.position)).all()`
- After: `db.select().from(TodoTable).where(eq(TodoTable.session_id, sessionID)).orderBy(asc(TodoTable.position))`

### 3. Files with 0 Drizzle calls (no changes needed)
- packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts — no Drizzle .all() or .run()
- packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts — no Drizzle imports or calls
- packages/opencode/src/session/revert.ts — all `.run()` calls are `sync.run()` not Drizzle

### Risk
- message-v2.ts is a DIRTY file with prior session changes — edits must be additive and preserve existing modifications
- All changes are syntactically mechanical — `select().from().all()` → `select().from()` works in Drizzle for all dialects; `.run()` → `.execute()` works for insert/delete in all dialects
- TypeScript types will be verified with typecheck
